name_en: 5BF131, Miu New Arrival Shell Backpack, exquisite and delicate glossy calfskin, minimalist lines combined with runway inspiration and the modern woman's temperament, balancing style experimentation and exquisite diversity. The bag has multiple wearing ways: single shoulder, handbag, crossbody, backpack, presenting a versatile retro style. Continuing Miu's unconventional, bold innovation, lazy yet natural and free-spirited style, distinct personality, capable of handling various styles, an excellent choice for work commuting or shopping.
name_cn:

Size:24 X 14 X8.5 cm
